code: import React,{useState}from'react';import TodoItem from'../TodoItem';import TODOS from'../../mock/todos';import'./style.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ToDoPage(){const[todos,setTodos]=useState(TODOS);const[newTodo,setNewTodo]=useState('');const handleAddTodo=()=>{const trimmed=newTodo.trim();if(!trimmed){return;}setTodos(prev=>[...prev,{id:Date.now(),title:trimmed,completed:false}]);setNewTodo('');};const handleToggleTodo=id=>{setTodos(prev=>prev.map(todo=>todo.id===id?{...todo,completed:!todo.completed}:todo));};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"todo-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"todo-panel",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"todo-kicker",children:"To Do"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"To Do List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"todo-text",children:"Add simple tasks and click an item to open its details page."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"todo-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:newTodo,onChange:event=>setNewTodo(event.target.value),placeholder:"Write a new task..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"ui-button ui-button--primary",onClick:handleAddTodo,children:"Add Todo"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"todo-grid",children:todos.map(todo=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TodoItem,{id:todo.id,title:todo.title,completed:todo.completed,todo:todo,onClick:()=>handleToggleTodo(todo.id)},todo.id))})]})});}
